title: Sekiro Sounds
description: Replaces the Epic Fight sounds with Sekiro sounds.
body:
Thrilling and refreshing new sounds from **Sekiro**, in Minecraft!


This resource pack aims to replicate Sekiro gameplay by changing the default [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) sounds to the ones from Sekiro!


Details:

- **8** new **parry** sounds!
- **7** different **hit** sounds!
- new **revelation/guard break** sound!


See it in action!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PirDyKqxELM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>








The Resource Pack requires [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight), as it changes sounds from it.


Resource Pack made by Lexagon and BrikNex.
